scripts.kern:compile:workspaces: npm run kern:compile -w packages/core && npm run kern:compile -w packages/forge && npm run kern:compile -w packages/adapter-cli && npm run kern:compile -w packages/cli && npm run kern:compile -w packages/mcp && npm run kern:compile -w packages/saas-api
scripts.rebuild: npm run kern:compile && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run build:types
scripts.build:cli:workspaces: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/forge && npm run build -w packages/adapter-cli && npm run build -w packages/cli
scripts.install:cli: npm run build:cli && cd packages/cli && npm link
scripts.release:cli: npm run build:cli && node scripts/release/publish-if-new.mjs packages/cli
scripts.release: npm run release:dedup && npm run release:cli
scripts.test: npm run kern:test && npm run test:ts
